findings.title: Unbounded retry on 401 response
findings.summary: The adapter currently retries on HTTP 401 responses, which will never succeed without credentials refresh and burns the budget.
findings.suggestedFixDirection: Classify 401 as non-retryable in isTransientError and add a regression test that asserts a single attempt.

findings.title: Backoff jitter uses Math.random without a seedable RNG
findings.summary: The backoff implementation pulls entropy directly from Math.random, making retry tests flaky.
findings.suggestedFixDirection: Accept an optional rng: () => number parameter on the adapter constructor and default to Math.random in production.
